forbidden.name: no-unresolved
forbidden.comment: Every static import in the cruised graph must resolve.

forbidden.name: no-circular
forbidden.comment: Cycles are architecture debt; keep this visible without blocking the first rollout.

forbidden.name: contexts-must-not-import-apps
forbidden.comment: Repository topology: contexts own live semantics and must not depend on app/runtime details.

forbidden.name: contexts-must-not-import-generated-projections
forbidden.comment: Repository topology: generated artifacts are projections and never upstream authority for contexts.

forbidden.name: worker-must-not-import-web
forbidden.comment: Runtime boundary: worker code must not depend on frontend implementation.

forbidden.name: web-must-not-import-worker-src
forbidden.comment: UI boundary: web may call the worker API, not import worker internals.

forbidden.name: web-must-not-import-generated-api-projection
forbidden.comment: apps/web/docs/ui-surface-contract.md keeps API intent mapping dependency-free from generated projections.

forbidden.name: note-model-context-must-not-import-peer-contexts
forbidden.comment: Note Model owns document semantics and must not depend on Scheduler, Context Assembly, Memory, or AI Operations.

forbidden.name: memory-context-must-not-import-peer-contexts
forbidden.comment: Memory owns source-backed memory lifecycle and must not import other product contexts.

forbidden.name: scheduler-context-only-imports-note-model
forbidden.comment: Repository topology permits Scheduler -> Note Model for section snapshots only.

forbidden.name: context-assembly-only-imports-note-model-and-memory
forbidden.comment: Repository topology permits Context Assembly -> Note Model and Memory only.

forbidden.name: ai-operations-only-imports-note-model-and-memory
forbidden.comment: Repository topology permits AI Operations -> Note Model and Memory vocabulary only.

forbidden.name: topology-context-must-not-import-product-contexts
forbidden.comment: Topology live contract should project topology edges, not depend on product context implementations.

forbidden.name: ai-operation-runtime-must-not-import-note-sot-write-adapters
forbidden.comment: Repository topology: AI runtime/projection paths must not create a direct AI-to-Note/Section/Block SoT write edge.

forbidden.name: shared-ui-must-not-import-product-features
forbidden.comment: Shared UI stays generic and must not become a shortcut owner for product semantics.
